description: There are a couple of reasons to include this belt in your wardrobe: the soft suede is a nice change of pace from full grain leather, and the classic good looks will complement any pair of pants. This suede-leather belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length 8 0 cms Made of suede-leather for durability and style Broad tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand logo embossed on tail Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Use a leather conditioner to protect the leather
